listings.description: Step into a rare opportunity to own a piece of history in the heart of downtown Leesburg. This classic colonial sits on an oversized lot, offering endless potential to expand, personalize, or simply enjoy as-is. Inside, you'll find a flexible layout with multiple living spaces, a charming kitchen, and light-filled rooms that reflect the home's timeless character. Upstairs features additional bedrooms perfect for guests, a home office, or creative space. Relax on the inviting front porch or unwind in the private, fenced backyard-ideal for entertaining or quiet evenings under the trees. Just steps away from Leesburg's vibrant downtown, you're moments from award-winning restaurants, local shops, coffee spots, and a lively community filled with energy and personality. It's not just a home-it's a lifestyle surrounded by some of the coolest places and people in Loudoun County. Opportunities like this don't come often. Own a piece of Historic Leesburg and make it your own.
COMING SOON! Spacious 4 bedroom, 3.5 bath colonial with a full finished basement awaiting your personal touches in Leesburg. Professional photos are on the way.

Experience the best of both worlds - peaceful country living just minutes from town. Nestled on 3.14 private acres with no HOA, this spacious split-level home offers over 4,100 square feet of total living space across two levels. The upper level welcomes you with an updated kitchen featuring stainless steel appliances that flows seamlessly into a bright eat-in area and a cozy family room with a fireplace. The expansive primary suite is a true retreat, complete with a sitting room, French doors opening to a deck, a spa-like bath with a soaking tub, and a generously sized walk-in closet. A formal dining room, living room, and full bath round out this level. Downstairs, the lower level is built for both comfort and entertaining. Three bedrooms with ample closet space, a large rec room with a wet bar that walks out to the patio and backyard, a mudroom connecting to an oversized two-car garage, a full bath, and laundry complete the space. Step outside to your own private oasis - a fenced backyard shaded by mature trees, with an in-ground pool perfect for summer entertaining.

Welcome to 103 Duvall Court in Leesburg, a meticulously maintained home that perfectly blends timeless character with modern updates in the highly sought after East Stratford community. Tucked away on a quiet cul de sac, this beautifully cared for home welcomes you from the moment you arrive. Step inside and you are immediately greeted by fresh paint throughout, rich hardwood floors, and a bright open floor plan that feels both grand and inviting. Soaring high ceilings add volume and elegance, while the seamless flow between the living and dining areas makes everyday living and entertaining effortless. The renovated kitchen is a true showstopper, featuring granite countertops, a center island, stainless steel appliances, and ample cabinetry. Everything a home chef could ask for. Upstairs you will find all four generously sized bedrooms, including a stunning primary suite. The suite boasts a walk in closet and a spa inspired renovated bathroom complete with a soaking tub, stand up shower, and double vanity. Step outside to your private deck and take in the breathtaking views of mature trees and open space - whether it is your morning coffee or an evening unwind, this is a backdrop you will never tire of. The flat lot offers plenty of usable outdoor space, and the walkout basement provides endless potential. The attached two car garage adds everyday convenience. Major updates bring added peace of mind, including a roof that is only three years old and replacement windows throughout, backed by a lifetime warranty. Residents of East Stratford enjoy access to a clubhouse, community gym, pool, and much more - all just minutes from Route 7, downtown Leesburg, shopping, dining, and top rated schools.

Photos and Floor plan will be uploaded by April 29th. 1100 Justinian Street | The Cornwall Model | Meadowbrook Farm Introducing a truly exceptional opportunity in the heart of Meadowbrook Farm-an exquisite, limited-edition Cornwall Model by renowned builder Van Metre. Masterfully designed and beautifully appointed, this residence blends timeless elegance with modern luxury in one unforgettable home. From the moment you arrive, the wrap-around porch and charming metal roof create striking curb appeal and set the tone for what awaits inside. The main level features a seamless open-concept design enhanced by rich engineered floors and abundant natural light throughout. At the center of the home, the expansive family room showcases a gas fireplace-both inviting and sophisticated. The gourmet kitchen is a true showpiece, offering quartz countertops, an oversized island with seating, stainless steel appliances, including a gas cooktop, wall oven, and built-in microwave, plus a spacious pantry. Just off the kitchen, a thoughtfully designed mudroom provides easy access to the oversized rear-entry garage and backyard patio-perfect for effortless everyday living. Upstairs, retreat to a luxurious primary suite featuring a tray ceiling, dual walk-in closets, and a spa-inspired bath with separate vanities, a glass-enclosed shower, and a private water closet. Two additional bedrooms, a full bath, and a second upper-level laundry room add comfort and convenience. An open study/den offers flexibility and can easily be converted to a true fourth bedroom. The walk-up lower level expands the living space with a spacious finished recreation room, an additional den, a full bathroom, a second laundry area, and generous storage-ideal for an in-law suite, au pair quarter, or private guest retreat. Outdoor living is equally impressive. Step through the glass patio doors to a beautifully designed patio, surrounded by extensive professional landscaping and supported by an automatic irrigation system. The backyard offers a private oasis perfect for entertaining, grilling, or relaxing evenings under the stars. Additional highlights include: 2-car oversized rear-entry garage Hardy Plank siding Designer finishes throughout Prime location within steps of the neighborhood pond, community center, park, tennis courts, and tot lot Conveniently located just minutes from the Greenway and Route 7, with easy access to historic Leesburg, this home combines luxury, lifestyle, and location in one remarkable package. Don't miss your chance to own one of Meadowbrook Farm's most coveted models. Schedule your private tour today and experience the exceptional quality and charm that define this extraordinary home.

Prime Leesburg Location!!! Welcome to this meticulously maintained brick-front Colonial in the sought-after Ashton Downs community in the heart of Leesburg. This three-level Hampton model offers approximately 3,445 square feet with 4 bedrooms, 3.5 bathrooms, and a two-car garage, ideally situated on a flat and private .24-acre lot with a large Amish-built storage shed. This is your opportunity to own a beautiful home within walking distance to shops and restaurants in downtown Leesburg, the W&OD Trail, Foxridge Park, Ida Lee Park, and Loudoun County High School. A bright two-story foyer welcomes you into the home. The main level offers a private home office ideal for remote work or study , along with a formal living room and spacious dining room perfect for entertaining. The updated kitchen is the heart of the home, featuring quartz countertops, a center island, newer stainless steel appliances, and a cozy breakfast area. Adjacent to the kitchen is the warm and inviting family room with a wood-burning fireplace , and sliding glass doors lead to the deck, creating the perfect space for outdoor dining, grilling, and relaxing in the backyard. Upstairs, the spacious primary suite features vaulted ceilings, a large walk-in closet, and a beautifully updated spa-like bathroom with a quartz double-sink vanity, frameless glass shower, and a separate freestanding soaking tub. Three additional generously sized bedrooms and an updated hall bathroom conveniently shared by the secondary bedrooms complete the upper level. The fully finished lower level expands the living space with a large recreation room, a full bathroom, and a fifth bedroom or flexible space, perfect for guests, a home gym, or an additional office, along with additional storage areas. This well-maintained home has benefited from consistent preventative maintenance over the years, offering buyers both comfort and peace of mind. Notable upgrades include a fully remodeled primary bathroom (2023), an updated kitchen with quartz countertops, pantry with sliding shelves, new sink and fixtures (2017), and bamboo flooring on the main level. Major improvements also include a solar backup smart power panel (2024) , additional attic insulation (2023), new sump pump (2020), leaf-guard gutter system (2020), HVAC system (2014), roof and siding (2011), and replacement windows (2009). Recent updates include fresh interior, exterior, and foundation paint, new carpet, driveway seal coating, radon testing, humidifier servicing, dryer vent cleaning, additional garage insulation, and updated lighting, window coverings, and bathroom fixtures. Additional features such as a 10x12 Amish-built storage shed, surge protection for the main electrical panel, insulated garage doors, and gas lines for the stove and dryer further enhance the home's functionality and value. Ashton Downs is a highly desirable Leesburg neighborhood known for its welcoming community atmosphere, proximity to the W&OD Trail, top-rated schools, and easy access to historic downtown Leesburg. Commuters will appreciate the close proximity to the Dulles Greenway, Route 7, and Route 15, with the Silver Line Metro and Dulles International Airport just 20 minutes away.

Welcome to this beautifully updated 5-bedroom, 3.5-bath home with a 2-car garage, ideally situated on in the heart of Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed for both comfort and functionality, this spacious residence is perfect for a growing household. Inside, you'll find hardwood flooring throughout, creating a warm and cohesive feel across the home. The layout offers exceptional convenience with two separate laundry areas-one located on the upper level near the bedrooms and an additional setup on the lower level. The fully finished lower level is an ideal space for entertaining or extended living, featuring a large recreation room with a wet bar, two additional bedrooms, and a full bathroom-perfect for guests, an in-law suite, or private workspace. Beyond the home, enjoy easy access to everything Leesburg has to offer. Commuters will appreciate proximity to Route 7, Route 15, and the Dulles Greenway, as well as convenient access to the Ashburn Metro Station (Silver Line). Daily essentials are just minutes away with nearby grocery options including Wegmans, Giant, and Harris Teeter. Leesburg's vibrant dining and shopping scene is right at your doorstep, with popular restaurants such as Tuscarora Mill, Lightfoot Restaurant, Fire Works Pizza, and SideBar all within a short drive. Historic Downtown Leesburg offers charming boutiques, coffee shops, and community events, while nearby parks and trails provide endless outdoor recreation opportunities. This is a home that truly offers the perfect balance of style, space, and location-an exceptional opportunity you won't want to miss.

Some homes simply feel right the moment you walk in-and this split-level single-family home is one of them. Comfortable, welcoming, and thoughtfully updated, it offers the kind of everyday ease that's hard to find. Upstairs, four well-sized bedrooms and two full bathrooms provide space and privacy for everyone. Natural light fills the rooms, and on certain nights, the skylight casts a soft glow of moonlight-an unexpected touch of warmth and charm. The primary suite features two generous closets, including a cedar-lined closet that blends character with everyday function. The main level is designed for connection and comfort. The kitchen is the heart of the home-open, inviting, and ideal for both daily living and entertaining-while glass French doors offer the option for separation when needed. It flows into the family room, where a cozy fireplace and built-in entertainment center set the stage for relaxed evenings. Sliding doors open to the private backyard for easy indoor-outdoor living. A formal dining room provides a welcoming space for gatherings, and the light-filled living room offers additional room to unwind, complete with a charming barn door for added privacy. Fresh City Loft "greige" paint, brand-new carpet, updated lighting, and refreshed bathrooms create a clean, modern, move-in-ready feel throughout. Practical highlights include: Two-car garage No HOA Fully paid-off solar panels, with energy costs often around $10/month Outside, the spacious backyard is perfect for entertaining, relaxing, or simply enjoying a quiet evening. Located in the historic part of Leesburg, the neighborhood is rich in character, with nearby brown street signs marking places filled with history, culture, and a strong sense of community-making this not just a home, but a place to belong. Walking distance to Downtown Leesburg and only a mile away from Ida Lee Park! This location is unbeatable!

Freshly Updated & Move-In Ready in Highly Sought-After Potomac Station! Welcome home to 43224 Cardston Place - a beautifully maintained 4-bedroom, 3.5-bath home in the heart of Leesburg's beloved Potomac Station community. Lovingly cared for and recently refreshed, this home shines with brand-new interior paint and new carpet throughout, giving it a crisp, clean feel you'll love the moment you walk through the door. Spanning approximately 3,298 square feet on a generous lot, this home offers thoughtful living spaces with three finished levels. The main floor features an open, inviting layout perfect for everyday living and entertaining. Upstairs, you'll find four spacious bedrooms, including a primary suite with private bath. But the real wow factor? The fully finished basement - providing tons of extra flexible space for a home theater, gym, playroom, guest suite, or home office. It's the kind of bonus square footage that truly sets this home apart. Pride of ownership shows everywhere in this well-maintained gem - from the thoughtful updates to the solid bones. Whether you're relaxing on the deck or screen porch, enjoying the level backyard, or simply soaking in the bright, refreshed interior, this home feels warm, welcoming, and ready for your next chapter. Live the Potomac Station Lifestyle Nestled in one of Leesburg's most convenient and family-friendly neighborhoods, Potomac Station offers the perfect blend of suburban charm and everyday ease. Residents enjoy access to community amenities including walking/biking trails, a swimming pool with sundeck, fitness center, playground, tennis/pickleball courts, and more. You're just minutes from excellent Loudoun County schools, shopping at Leesburg Corner and the Outlets, dining, and major commuter routes (Route 7, 15, and Dulles Greenway). It's the ideal location for busy professionals and growing families who want it all - space, community, and location. Updates include: hot water heater, 2022. HVAC, 2021. Windows replaced, 2024: Renewal by Anderson. Roof replaced, 2021. Leaf Guards on gutters

A Century of Character in Downtown Leesburg Leesburg Historic District, Leesburg, VA 3 BD | 1 BA | 1/3 Acre Lot | Built 1910 | Detached 2-Car Garage | Sold As-Is Steeped in history and full of original charm, this 1910 craftsman-era home sits proudly in the heart of Leesburg's beloved Historic District - lovingly cared for by the same family for over 50 years. Offered for sale as-is, this is a rare chance to own a piece of Leesburg history and make it your own. Step up onto the welcoming covered front porch - the perfect spot for a morning coffee - and into a home that has been cherished across generations. Inside, warm and cozy bedrooms invite rest, while the bathroom retains its original claw-foot tub, a true hallmark of the era. Original hardwood floors are believed to lie beneath the current flooring, waiting to be uncovered and restored to their former glory. The property sits on an exceptional 1/3-acre lot - a genuinely rare find in downtown Leesburg - offering space, privacy, and possibilities that simply don't come along often in this location. A detached two-car garage adds even more practical value. Whether you're a preservation enthusiast, an investor, or a buyer dreaming of restoring a classic home to its original splendor, this property delivers unmatched potential in one of Northern Virginia's most sought-after historic neighborhoods. Properties like this - with this much soul - rarely come to market. HISTORIC DISTRICT NOTICE: This property lies within the Town of Leesburg Historic District. Future exterior renovations and alterations are subject to review and approval by the Leesburg Board of Architectural Review (BAR). Prospective buyers are encouraged to familiarize themselves with applicable guidelines prior to making an offer. ADDITIONAL NOTICE: The home is currently occupied and furnished. AI-assisted editing was used to remove furnishings from interior listing photos. Property is being sold strictly as-is.

Don't miss this beautiful 4 bedroom/2.5 bath colonial in sought after Potomac Crossing! This home has almost 3,000 finished square feet and has been tastefully updated with fresh paint, new flooring, updated kitchen/appliances and more! The main level features a dramatic 2 story foyer, a formal living/dining room w/ bay window, an updated kitchen featuring white cabinets, granite counters, SS appliances and updated flooring that opens to a huge family room w/ dramatic ceilings/windows and fireplace! Get ready to entertain family and friends on your large private deck that overlooks a light filled fenced yard that backs to trees. Head upstairs and you'll find 4 large bedrooms and 2 full baths, including an impressive owners suite complete with walk in closet and luxury bath with dual sinks, soaking tub and separate shower. The unfinished basement features over 1000 square feet and is ready for your imagination. This home is located just mins to Rt 15, Rt 7, shopping, dining, historic downtown Leesburg, Leesburg Premium Outlets, breweries/wineries and more! LOW LOW HOA fees!

IMPROVED PRICE!!!*****IMPROVED PRICE!!!*****IMPROVED PRICE!!!***** WELCOME TO 405 HANRAHAN COURT SE - Located on a quiet no-thru street in the sought-after East Stratford community, this 4-bedroom, 3.5-bathroom residence offers over 3,600 sqft of living space. With approximately $80,000 in thoughtful renewals performed between 2023 and 2025, this home is the ideal combination of modern luxury and peace of mind. It is a "lock-and-leave" property for those who prioritize high-end interiors over weekend yard work. Positioned just minutes from downtown Leesburg - leave the lawnmower behind and enjoy the area's premier dining and boutiques. ARCHITECTURAL CHARACTER & MODERN UPGRADES - As you enter, you are greeted by a signature Palladian window above the front door, flooding the foyer with natural light. The interior is entirely carpetless, featuring new hardwoods on the main and upper levels, and Luxury Vinyl Plank (LVP) in the basement. New recessed lighting throughout creates a bright, modern vibe. DRAMATIC LIVING & CHEF'S KITCHEN - The two-story great room features high vaulted ceilings, a fireplace, and a wall of tiered windows. These windows are equipped with smart blinds, providing effortless privacy for the upper-level glass. The kitchen has been upgraded for the modern chef, featuring a farmhouse sink, upgraded quartz countertops that contrast the butcherblock island, and smart LED under-cabinet lighting. WORK FROM HOME & RESTFUL RETREATS - The main level includes a dedicated private office with French doors. Upstairs, all bedrooms feature custom light-blocking shades for an optimal sleep environment. The large primary suite is a true retreat, featuring two dressing closets with built-in organization and an upgraded en-suite bathroom with a detached French soaking tub and a spacious shower. INFRASTRUCTURE & QUALITY OF LIFE - Critical systems have been recently upgraded for efficiency and water quality: * NEW ROOF (2023): Complete system replacement featuring GAF high-definition architectural shingles, premium ice and water shield, synthetic underlayment, and new ridge ventilation. * WHOLE-HOUSE WATER TREATMENT (2024): Includes an Aquasure 48,000-grain digital softener to protect plumbing, a bacteria-inhibiting pre-filter, and a Reverse Osmosis system for pure drinking water at the kitchen tap. * 75-GALLON HIGH-CAPACITY WATER SYSTEM (2025): New Rheem Performance natural gas heater with high-recovery BTU-specifically chosen to provide abundant, back-to-back hot water for all 3.5 baths. * LOWER LEVEL & STORAGE: The basement features a finished living area that includes a media room with recessed lighting and night-light options for movie nights. Additionally, an unfinished area provides the perfect space for additional storage. GARAGE & PARKING - The 20-foot wide garage provides space for up to 2 cars, while the double-width asphalt driveway allows for side-by-side parking for 2 additional vehicles. COMMUNITY & LIFESTYLE - As part of the East Stratford PUD, enjoy access to the Stratford Club pool, clubhouse, tennis courts, and a residents-only catch-and-release fishing lake with a surrounding pedestrian trail - all just minutes from historic downtown Leesburg.

Beautifully appointed and rich in character, this four-bedroom, two-and-a-half-bath residence by renowned local builder Paul Reimers is ideally situated in the heart of historic downtown Leesburg. Thoughtfully designed and meticulously maintained, the home offers an exceptional blend of timeless craftsmanship and modern convenience. The interior showcases gleaming wood floors that flow seamlessly throughout the main living spaces, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere. At the heart of the home, a well-equipped kitchen features stainless steel appliances, granite countertops, and ample cabinetry-perfectly suited for both everyday living and effortless entertaining. A highly desirable main-level primary bedroom offers both comfort and convenience, providing a private retreat with easy accessibility. This thoughtfully positioned space enhances the home's livability, ideal for a variety of lifestyle needs. Upstairs, additional generously sized bedrooms provide flexibility for guests, home office space, or personal retreats, complemented by a well-appointed bath that reflect the home's classic aesthetic. Outdoors, a fully fenced yard creates a private oasis, ideal for relaxation, play, or al fresco gatherings. A large shed adds both functionality and storage, enhancing the property's practical appeal. Set just moments from Leesburg's charming shops, dining, and historic landmarks, this exceptional home presents a rare opportunity to enjoy refined living in one of Northern Virginia's most desirable settings.

Welcome to this charming 3-bedroom, 3-bath home offering 1,621 square feet of comfortable living space in a desirable Leesburg location. Nestled on a spacious 5-acre lot, this property combines a peaceful setting with convenient access to shopping, dining, and major commuter routes. Inside, you'll find a bright and functional layout with abundant natural light and inviting living areas perfect for both everyday living and entertaining. The home features well-sized bedrooms, multiple full baths for added convenience, and a layout designed for flexibility and comfort. Two wood-burning fireplaces-one on the main level and one in the basement-add warmth and character throughout the home. The basement includes a convenient walk-up exit, providing added accessibility and potential for additional use. Step outside to enjoy the rear patio and generous outdoor space-ideal for relaxing, gardening, or hosting gatherings. While the property does need some TLC, it presents a wonderful opportunity for buyers to personalize and make it their own. Don't miss your chance to own in one of Leesburg's sought-after areas!

DELIGHTFUL SUN-SPLASHED SFH ( IN FOXRIDGE COMMUNITY ) ON PIPESTEM RIGHT OFF CUL DE SAC - FRESHLY PAINTED WITH NEW CARPET THROUGHOUT - 3 LEVELS 4 BEDROOMS & 3.5 BATHS. HUGH UPPER LEVEL LOFT AREA THAT COULD EASILY AND AFFORDABLE BE CONVERTED TO ANOTHER BEDROOM IF NEEDED. THE FOXRIDGE COMMUNITY IS JUST A 10 MINUTE WALK TO DOWNTOWN LEESBURG ALONG THE ADJACENT W&O TRIAL THE HOME HAS A LARGE DECK AND PRIVATE BACKYARD

Set on a quiet cul-de-sac in one of Leesburg's most desirable pockets, 1303 Garrison Ct. NE offers the kind of effortless flow and thoughtful updates that make a home feel both refined and truly livable. From the moment you arrive, the redone driveway, garage door, and front walkway (2016), fresh driveway sealcoat (2026), and fresh interior paint (2026) create a polished first impression, while the roof (2014) and replaced windows (2018 and 2020) reflect the kind of careful upkeep that brings peace of mind. Inside, the fully renovated kitchen (2021) anchors the main level with a sleek, functional layout designed for everyday living and easy entertaining. The home transitions beautifully into the renovated lower level, where new basement flooring and a wet bar (2020) create a stylish extension of the living space, perfect for hosting, relaxing, or gathering with family and friends. Major mechanical updates, including the HVAC and furnace (2019) and hot water heater (2023), further underscore the home's quality and move-in-ready appeal. Outdoor living is equally inviting, with a new deck (2017) and patio (2019) that expand the home's entertaining spaces and provide a peaceful setting for morning coffee, evening dinners, or weekend gatherings. The result is a home that feels elevated yet comfortable, with a natural rhythm that supports both daily routines and special occasions. Beyond the property itself, the lifestyle is just as compelling. served by Loudoun county schools including Ball's Bluff, and moments from historic downtown Leesburg, IDA Lee park, and the area's beloved shops, dining, and community amenities, this address places you close to everything while still offering the calm and privacy of cul-de-sac living. it's a home that combines timeless quality, modern updates, and an ideal location into one beautifully complete package

Over 3,000 sq ft of finished living space with a main-level primary bedroom and one of the larger, more private backyards in Potomac Station. Set on .2 acres, the backyard offers rare space and separation while still being part of an established community. Inside, the flexible layout includes a main-level primary suite with full bath, additional bedrooms upstairs, and a finished walkout lower level with full bath - ideal for guests, a home office, or extra living space. Recent updates include carpet (2024), hot water heater (2024), washer/dryer (2025), dishwasher (2025), disposal (2026), HVAC (2016), and roof (2014). Potomac Station community amenities include a pool, clubhouse, playgrounds, courts, and walking trails.

Buy 1 , 2 or 3 Properties***** This home sits adjacent to two other properties/homes for sale**** Home was owned by the same family and is conveniently located in the Leesburg city limits*****DO YOU LOVE VINTAGE?????? This charming place has a throwback in time feel with original kitchen, baths and floors*****All Brick Rambler with a finished Lower Level ****Offers flexibility in the floor plan*****Two Wood Burning Fireplaces**** Hardwood Floors *****Covered Back Patio ******Includes an attached garage plus a detached garage with workshop and two sheds ****Home can be sold by itself although another Rambler next door could make this an interesting Multi Generational Living Lifestyle - just in separate houses for sale see MLS VALO2117372!****Vacant lot for sale too****** Oh the Possibilities !!! Renovation Potential ******NO HOA

Coming Soon - 41726 Stumptown Rd, Leesburg, VA 20176 Nestled on 5.05 private acres, this spacious and versatile property offers the perfect blend of comfort, functionality, and convenience. Boasting over 4,380 finished square feet, this home features 4+ bedrooms and 4 full bathrooms, providing ample space for everyday living and entertaining. Inside, you'll find multiple living areas highlighted by two fireplaces and two wood stoves, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere throughout. The expansive layout offers flexibility for multi-generational living, work-from-home setups, or guest accommodations. Enjoy the outdoors from the large front, side, and rear porches, perfect for relaxing and taking in the scenic surroundings. The property also features an in-ground swimming pool with hot tub, ideal for summer entertaining. Additional highlights include a detached apartment-perfect for guests, rental income, or private office space-and a 1-car garage. Conveniently located just minutes from shopping, grocery stores, local amenities, and Dulles International Airport, this property offers peaceful country living without sacrificing accessibility. More details and professional photos coming soon!

Step into this stately home nestled on a quiet cul-de-sac, where thoughtful design and luxurious upgrades create an unforgettable first impression. The moment you cross the threshold, you're greeted by a soaring floor-to-ceiling foyer showcasing unique details-including a custom wood and plexiglass staircase that sets the tone for the craftsmanship throughout. Continue into the open, airy family room, where a striking textured wall extends from the elegant fireplace all the way to the ceiling. Oversized tinted windows flood the space with natural light while filtering out harsh rays, creating a warm, inviting glow. To the right, the newly renovated kitchen will delight any home chef. Outfitted with premium counter-depth KraftMaid Maris-style high-gloss white cabinetry, a hidden coffee bar that opens with a gentle tap, and a GE Cafe commercial-style 6-burner gas range with double ovens and a stainless steel pot filler-this kitchen is both functional and stunning. Quartz countertops extend across the space, including a waterfall island with cascading edges, perfectly suited for cooking, gathering, or entertaining. From the sink, enjoy a lovely view through the expanded modern window, or step out through the new Pella sliding doors with built-in blinds to the oversized deck-ideal for your morning coffee or evening relaxation. Downstairs, the lower level offers a full 2-bedroom in-law suite complete with its own kitchen, living area, and full bath. Sliding glass doors open to a spacious stamped concrete patio, accompanied by a circular entertaining area shaded by custom Italian sail awnings from Maanta. Enjoy evenings by the firepit or spend weekends tending to the tiered raised garden beds-ready for your spring plantings. And here's the bonus: thanks to the addition of solar panels, the average electric bill comes in around $25 per month, bringing exceptional efficiency to this extraordinary home. Make sure to add 1709 Fairleigh Ct to your must-see list-this exceptional property combines design, comfort, and sustainability in one remarkable package.

Looking for a Special Place and Opportunity - Stop Looking and come see this all Brick Beautiful Rambler with charming front porch and a side load 2 car attached garage ***Located in Leesburg city limits sited on just under an acre****If you like a little character you will fall in love!*** Home has been in the same family since built and lovingly cared for****Updated Kitchen***Hardwood Floors ****Cozy Finished Lower Level with Wood Burning Brick Fireplace & Lots of storage - interior walk up from Lower level into Garage*** Covered back patio**Two Spacious Outdoor Storage - work shop - she shed or more -- So many possibilities !!!!YOU can buy this and the house next door which is also for sale see MLS# VALO2117374 - Potential multi generational living lifestyle - just in separate places!*******This is zoned residential however potential exceptions for day care or other business that could serve the community *****NO HOA!

BEAUTIFUL COLONIAL IN SOUGHT AFTER KINCAID FOREST. THIS HOME HAS 4 BEDROOMS, THREE AND A HALF BATHS AND A TWO CAR GARAGE. ON THE FIRST LEVEL YOU WILL FIND AN OFFICE, FORMAL LIVING ROOM, FORMAL DINING ROOM, HALF BATH, FAMILY ROOM WITH A FIREPLACE AND AN EAT IN KITCHEN LEADING TO A SUNROOM WITH ACCESS TO THE DECK. THE LAUNDRY ROOM IS ALSO LOCATED ON THIS LEVEL. ON THE SECOND LEVEL IS THE PRIMARY BEDROOM WITH ENSUITE BATH, THREE ADDITIONAL BEDROOMS AND A FULL BATH IN THE HALLWAY. THE LOWER LEVEL HAS A FAMILY ROOM WITH A FULL BATH, PLENTY OF STORAGE AND A WALK OUT SLIDING GLASS DOOR LEADING TO A PRIVATE ENCLOSED BACK PATIO. THIS HOME IS A MUST SEE!!!!

NEW LISTING in Sought After Greene Mill Preserve! A Jewel of a home with a Georgianstyle facade, this property pairs timeless architecture with modern comfort. Two front porches, designer landscaping, a flat yard, a long driveway, and a composite deck- create an exterior that feels both classic and current. Inside, sanded and stained hardwood floors, contemporary lighting, refined millwork, a two sided gas fireplace, and updated kitchen and baths create an interior shaped by quality and care. High ceilings, decorative columns, and abundant natural light enhance the home's open, airy feel. Step Inside to the Open Foyer- graced with Real Hardwood flooring that leads into an elegant dining room accented by crisp crown molding, chair rail, and a fusion globe chandelier that adds a touch of distinction. The gourmet kitchen inspires creativity with endless granite countertops, handcrafted cabinetry, under and over cabinet lighting, and high end stainless steel appliances- including a gas cooktop, built in microwave, and French door refrigerator. Morning light fills the breakfast room, while the great room invites relaxation beside a dramatic two sided gas fireplace that extends its warmth to the composite deck. A stacked stone surround frames the outdoor hearth, overlooking a manicured lawn that creates a peaceful backdrop for dining, entertaining, or unwinding. Back inside- A private study offers an ideal setting for work and a stylish powder room completes the main level. Ascend the Hardwood Stairs to the Upper Level- where the primary suite offers a haven of calm with a wall of windows, oversized walk in closet and space for a sitting area. The luxurious en suite bath features a granite topped vanity with two sinks, while a soaking tub, walk in shower, private water closet, and spa inspired tile create a retreat designed for restoration. Down the hall, two spacious bedrooms open to the front balcony, inviting fresh air and morning sun. A fourth bedroom shares a beautifully appointed hall bath with a dual sink vanity, and a laundry center with modern machines brings ease to daily routines. The lower level continues the theme of thoughtful craftsmanship with an expansive recreation room offering distinct areas for media, games, exercise, and quiet moments. A full bath and generous storage complete this exceptional space.
